title: Wave-1: playwright globalSetup/globalTeardown + config (timeout, ADMIN_EMAILS)
acceptance_criteria: globalSetup, in strict order: (1) delete the glob e2e.db, e2e.db-wal, e2e.db-shm; (2) run `node scripts/db-config.js development`; (3) assert prisma/schema.prisma datasource provider === 'sqlite' (throw + surface if 'postgresql'); (4) `prisma db push` against DEV_DATABASE_URL=file:./e2e.db; (5) no seeding here (specs own their seeds). It must complete fully before webServer starts (Playwright contract) — add a comment forbidding moving seeding to a server-parallel hook.
globalTeardown runs `git checkout -- prisma/schema.prisma` ONLY when process.env.CI is set (protect in-progress local schema edits).

playwright.config.ts: keep `command: 'npm run dev'` UNCHANGED; register globalSetup + globalTeardown; raise webServer.timeout to the value from pipeline/reviews/wave0-recon.md (>=600000) and update the lines 14-15 comment to match; add ADMIN_EMAILS='e2e-admin@vibesafe.test' to webServer.env; do NOT add NODE_ENV; do NOT add PAYMENT_TEST_FLOW. Keep workers:1, no extra browser projects.
Existing 6 specs still discovered and unaffected (testDir unchanged).
npm run typecheck + npm run lint pass; `npx playwright test --list` succeeds (lists specs without executing).
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of the globalSetup ordering invariant and the chosen timeout
